subject: [PATCH v2 03/14] fuse: refactor io-uring header copying from ring

2026-04-02.patch_summary: This patch refactors the logic for copying headers from a ring in the fuse kernel module to make it more clear and centralized. It introduces a new function, copy_header_from_ring(), which handles the actual copying of data from user space to kernel space. This function includes error handling and rate-limited logging. The existing code is modified to use this new function instead of directly calling copy_from_user(). This change improves the maintainability and readability of the code by separating the header copying logic into a single, self-contained function.
